modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to set Out of Office reply in Outlook

full_description_text: User want to set Out of Office message. They use Outlook. They say it not work. Need help with this issue.
